title: Gently Glazed Ethiopian Lentils Tandoor
description: Savory Ethiopian lentils cooked in a tandoor and glazed with a sweet caramel sauce, perfect for a romantic dinner
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, mix together the lentils, onion, garlic, ginger, tandoor spice blend, salt, and black pepper
Brush the inside of the tandoor with vegetable oil to prevent sticking
Add the lentil mixture to the tandoor and cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally
While the lentils are cooking, heat the caramel sauce in a small saucepan over medium heat
After the lentils have cooked for 20 minutes, brush them with the heated caramel sauce
Continue cooking the lentils for an additional 10 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning
Remove the lentils from the tandoor and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro
Serve the gently glazed Ethiopian lentils hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired
